docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,681.38 FILED BY SCHNEIDER, ANNE C. ROLAND, SHAWN M. AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, RUSSELL C/O VANGUARD PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2000 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO AUG-02-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-17-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, RUSSELL C/O VANGUARD PROPERTIES
CON'T REQUEST FILED BY DEFT. BARNES SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER. $10. FEES PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-02-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-23-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF.S. ROLAND REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DATE REQUESTED 9/6/00 AT 3:30PM.PAID $10.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-23-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-06-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, ANNE C. ROLAND, SHAWN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, RUSSELL C/O VANGUARD PROPERTIES $1,681.38 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,757.38, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
